name: Newspaper
preparation_steps: ["Keep dry","Bundle together","Remove staples if possible"]

name: Cardboard box
preparation_steps: ["Flatten before disposal","Remove tape and labels","Keep dry"]

name: PET water bottle
preparation_steps: ["Rinse thoroughly","Remove cap and label","Crush to save space"]

name: HDPE milk can
preparation_steps: ["Rinse with water","Remove cap"]

name: Aluminium can
preparation_steps: ["Rinse","Crush flat"]

name: Glass bottle
preparation_steps: ["Rinse","Remove metal lid","Handle with care"]

name: Food scraps
preparation_steps: ["Use compostable bag","Drain excess liquid"]

name: Garden waste
preparation_steps: ["Chop into smaller pieces","Keep separate from dry waste"]

name: Tea leaves
preparation_steps: ["Dispose with wet waste"]

name: AA battery
preparation_steps: ["Do not crush","Keep away from water","Store in original packaging if possible"]
safety_notes: Risk of acid leakage and chemical burns

name: Lithium battery
preparation_steps: ["Do not puncture or crush","Tape over terminals","Take to e-waste facility"]
safety_notes: Fire risk if damaged; do not throw in general bin

name: Paint can
preparation_steps: ["Let paint dry completely before disposal","Take to hazardous waste facility"]
safety_notes: Contains VOCs; skin and eye irritant

name: Pesticide bottle
preparation_steps: ["Never pour down drain","Take to authorised hazardous waste facility"]

name: Expired medicine
preparation_steps: ["Do not flush","Return to pharmacy take-back programme","Mix with coffee grounds before sealing in bag"]

name: CFL bulb
preparation_steps: ["Handle with care — do not break","Place in original packaging","Take to e-waste collector"]

name: Old smartphone
preparation_steps: ["Factory reset and delete data","Remove SIM and memory card","Take to authorised e-waste recycler"]
safety_notes: Contains lithium battery — fire risk if dismantled improperly

name: Laptop
preparation_steps: ["Back up and wipe data","Remove battery if possible","Take to certified e-waste facility"]
safety_notes: Contains hazardous metals; battery fire risk

name: Charger
preparation_steps: ["Coil cable neatly","Take to e-waste drop point"]

name: Printer ink cartridge
preparation_steps: ["Do not empty","Return to brand take-back scheme"]

name: Sanitary pad
preparation_steps: ["Wrap in newspaper or paper before disposal","Place in black bin or dedicated sanitary bin"]

name: Diaper
preparation_steps: ["Wrap tightly","Dispose in black sanitary bin"]

name: Bandage
preparation_steps: ["Seal in bag","Dispose in black bin"]

name: Brick
preparation_steps: ["Separate from general waste","Contact municipal C&D collection"]

name: Ceramic tile
preparation_steps: ["Wrap sharp pieces","Contact C&D waste collector"]

name: Thermocol
preparation_steps: ["Do not burn","Dispose in grey/black reject bin"]

name: Soiled food wrapper
preparation_steps: ["Cannot be recycled when soiled","Dispose in reject bin"]

name: Broken crockery
preparation_steps: ["Wrap in newspaper to prevent injury","Dispose in reject/general bin"]

name: Tetrapak
preparation_steps: ["Rinse and flatten","Some areas accept at dry waste centres"]

name: Coconut shell
preparation_steps: ["Break into pieces","Good for composting"]

name: Motor oil
preparation_steps: ["Never pour down drain","Store in sealed container","Take to authorised collection point"]
